prd.oneLiner: Connect review cycles, goals, self, peer, and manager feedback, calibration, and completion status.
prd.goal: Achieve 95% or more required-review completion within the review cycle.
prd.whyNow: Review forms, feedback, and progress are separated, making deadlines and fairness difficult for reviewers and operations teams to manage.
prd.problem: Review forms, feedback, and progress are separated, making deadlines and fairness difficult for reviewers and operations teams to manage.
prd.solution: Connect review cycles, goals, self, peer, and manager feedback, calibration, and completion status.
prd.alternatives: Email, chat, spreadsheets, and manual ledgers
prd.differentiator: Manage intake, processing, and operations data as one connected source of truth.

targets.name: Employee writing self-review and feedback
targets.needs: Quickly register needed work and know its status.
targets.pain: Review forms, feedback, and progress are separated, making deadlines and fairness difficult for reviewers and operations teams to manage.

targets.name: HR and performance operations coordinator
targets.needs: Manage priority and history and review operations metrics.
targets.pain: Review forms, feedback, and progress are separated, making deadlines and fairness difficult for reviewers and operations teams to manage.

scenarios.text: Employee writing self-review and feedback completes review cycle, goals, and self-review submission and checks progress.
HR and performance operations coordinator reviews review completion, calibration, and organization-distribution reporting.

prd.northStar: Share of operations requests completed on time

kpis.name: On-time processing rate
kpis.target: Achieve 95% or more required-review completion within the review cycle.
kpis.method: Monthly aggregation of completion history against target dates

kpis.name: Operations visibility
kpis.method: Share of registered requests connected to operations reporting

inScope: Review cycle, goals, and self-review submission
Review form, feedback, calibration, and completion-status lookup
Reviewer assignment, feedback collection, calibration, and result finalization
Review completion, calibration, and organization-distribution reporting
nonGoals: Replacing adjacent systems such as accounting or payroll
assumptions: User and organization data are available through company SSO.
Operators manage policy and classification criteria.
risks: Weak initial classification can cause incorrect processing.
Stale source data can reduce operational trust.
openQuestions: What defines urgent processing and approval?
What are the post-completion verification and reopen rules?
constraints: State, owner, and priority changes require audit logs.
